channel.title: Rushabh Shah · Blog
channel.description: Articles on DevOps, Kubernetes, Docker, observability (Grafana LGTM stack, OpenTelemetry), cloud cost optimization, and Linux, by Rushabh Shah, Docker Captain & Grafana Champion.

item.title: Hello, world: the blog now lives on rushabhshah.dev
item.description: Why I moved my writing from Hashnode to my own domain, and how this markdown-powered blog with scheduled publishing works under the hood.
